name: Ironbeck
dialogue: These walls are mineral and bone — same as my picmon.
If you can't read the rock, you can't read the fight.
Show me what your team's made of.
preBattleLine: Ironbeck cracks her knuckles. The crystals on her belt hum.
postDefeatDialogue: Hmph. You read the rock just fine.
Deeper in, the cave gets meaner. Don't let your guard down.
